text: I feel like a wanderer between two worlds. Standing outside the glassed meeting room, I catch fleeting glimpses of others in focused communication, separated from me by transparent yet impassable barriers. In the next space, vibrant colors and bold letters invite me into an environment of innovation and reflection—it feels more open, intellectually stimulating, inviting me to contemplate progress and connection. Here, anticipation blends with curiosity; I sense the urge to both observe and participate, wondering how my presence alters the fabric of these moments.
